CLAUDE.md — Edward Kao Personal Website

Project Overview

Personal academic/portfolio website for Edward Kao, hosted on GitHub Pages at https://edwardkao6413.github.io. Built with Jekyll (pinned to 3.9.x via github-pages gem), plain CSS with design tokens, and vanilla JS.

Owner

  • Name: Edward Kao
  • Role: Data Scientist & Bioinformatics Researcher
  • Email: edwardkao6413@gmail.com
  • GitHub: https://github.com/edwardkao6413

Tech Stack

  • Static site generator: Jekyll 3.9.x (via github-pages gem — do NOT upgrade to Jekyll 4.x)
  • Templating: Liquid
  • Styling: Plain CSS with CSS custom properties (no Tailwind, no Bootstrap, no external CSS framework)
  • JavaScript: Vanilla JS only (no React, no jQuery)
  • Hosting: GitHub Pages, branch main, root /
  • Icons: Font Awesome 6.5.0 via CDN

Repository Structure

/
├── CLAUDE.md                # This file
├── _config.yml              # Jekyll site-wide config
├── Gemfile                  # Ruby gems (github-pages + webrick)
├── index.html               # Homepage
├── publications.md          # Publications sub-page
├── career.md                # Career sub-page
├── other-works.md           # Other Works sub-page
├── _layouts/
│   └── default.html         # Shared HTML shell
├── _includes/
│   ├── navbar.html          # Fixed top navbar (hamburger on mobile)
│   └── footer.html          # Footer with social icons and copyright
├── assets/
│   ├── css/main.css         # All styles (design tokens + component styles)
│   ├── js/main.js           # Navbar toggle + keyword typewriter animation
│   └── img/                 # Images (profile.jpg goes here when ready)
├── doc/
│   └── CV_Edward.pdf        # Resume PDF
├── references/
│   └── web-structure.md     # Original site spec/template reference
├── docs/superpowers/plans/  # Implementation plans
├── .dev-manager/            # Dev-manager workflow state and plans
└── .agents/                 # Local agent skills (e.g. UI-Design-Master)

Active Agents

  • UI-Design-Master — .agents/UI-Design-Master/SKILL — use for ALL styling, CSS, and visual design decisions. Always invoke before writing or updating CSS.
  • dev-manager — .dev-manager/workflow.md — orchestrates planning, implementation, and review stages.

Design Direction (UI-Design-Master: Editorial Luxury / Refined Restraint)

  • Aesthetic: Quietly confident academic portfolio — feels like a curated research monograph, not a generic dev site
  • Tone: Editorial luxury / refined restraint
  • Differentiation: Deep navy + warm cream palette with serif italic display font

Color Tokens

| Token | Value | Use | |—|—|—| | --color-navy-900 | #0d1b2a | Navbar background, headings | | --color-navy-700 | #1b3a52 | Hover states, borders | | --color-teal-600 | #1a7a6e | Primary accent — links, highlights, cursor | | --color-teal-400 | #2aa898 | Hover on accent elements | | --color-cream-50 | #faf8f4 | Page background | | --color-neutral-900 | #2c2c2c | Body text |

Typography

  • Display font: Cormorant Garamond (Google Fonts) — italic, weight 400/600
  • Body font: DM Sans (Google Fonts) — weight 400/500/600
  • Never use: Inter, Roboto, Arial as display; purple gradients; flat solid backgrounds

Motion

  • Hero entrance: fadeUp animation (0.8s, staggered per element)
  • One high-impact moment only — no scattered micro-animations
  • prefers-reduced-motion respected (all durations set to 0.01ms)

Accessibility

  • WCAG AA: 4.5:1 contrast normal text, 3:1 large text
  • Touch targets ≥ 44×44px on mobile
  • focus-visible outlines on all interactive elements (teal, 2px, offset 4px)
  • prefers-reduced-motion media query included

Navigation Pages

Each sub-page is a Jekyll Markdown file (publications.md, career.md, other-works.md). Jekyll compiles them into routes using the permalink front matter key and renders them through the default.html layout, so they inherit the navbar, footer, fonts, and CSS automatically. Edit the .md file to add content; GitHub Pages rebuilds on push.

Label Route Source file Status
Resume /doc/CV_Edward.pdf doc/CV_Edward.pdf PDF (replace placeholder when ready)
Publications /publications publications.md Stub — edit to add content
Career /career career.md Stub — edit to add content
Other Works /other-works other-works.md Stub — edit to add content

Key Config Values (_config.yml)

  • baseurl: "" — do not change; changing it breaks all | relative_url links
  • navbar.resume_url: /doc/CV_Edward.pdf — update when real PDF is placed
  • social.github: https://github.com/edwardkao6413

Development Commands

# Install gems (first time only)
bundle install

# Local preview
bundle exec jekyll serve
# → http://127.0.0.1:4000

# Build static output (for checking _site/)
bundle exec jekyll build

Important Constraints

  1. Jekyll version: The github-pages gem locks Jekyll to 3.9.x. Do not add Jekyll 4-only features (e.g. webrick is required explicitly because of Ruby 3.x compatibility).
  2. No JS frameworks: Vanilla JS only. No npm, no node_modules, no build tools.
  3. CSS architecture: All styles in assets/css/main.css. Use CSS custom properties (--var) for all tokens — no hardcoded colours or sizes outside :root.
  4. Exclude from build: Gemfile, Gemfile.lock, docs/, .dev-manager/, .agents/, references/, README.md are all in _config.yml exclude list — do not remove them.
  5. Resume PDF: Do not use touch doc/CV_Edward.pdf — it creates a zero-byte file that renders as a broken PDF. Either place a real PDF or use a disabled navbar link.

Workflow

This project follows the edward-dev-workflow via .dev-manager/state.json.

Current state: FINALIZED — foundational structure complete and pushed to origin/main.

Completed plan: .dev-manager/plans/2026-06-06-personal-website-foundation.md

Next content tasks (start a new plan for each):

  • Add profile photo: place assets/img/profile.jpg
  • Add CV PDF: place doc/CV_Edward.pdf
  • Populate publications.md, career.md, other-works.md with real content

© Edward Kao • 2026
